education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering, GPA: 4.0/4.0
education.degreeLatex: \textit{Master of Science in Computer Engineering}, GPA: 4.0/4.0

bullets.text: Build a Python/PostgreSQL data pipeline with agentic AI loop with automatic measurable feedback from private database.
Focused on UI/UX improvements for the Crossflow Diagram Editor, a visual interface for reactive Rust workflows.
bullets.latex: Focused on \textbf{UI/UX} improvements for the \href{https://github.com/Open-rmf/crossflow}{\textbf{Crossflow Diagram Editor}}, a visual interface for reactive Rust workflows.

bullets.text: Design and implement React/TypeScript features that improve graph-editing correctness, reduce invalid user actions, and make workflow construction more predictable.
Collaborating with OSRF mentors and community through open-source development workflows including issue triage, design discussion, implementation, CI/CD, and code review.
Led the development of LibDupFinder, which automated duplicate detection against the Primo VE library catalog.
bullets.latex: Led the development of \href{lib-dup-finder.vercel.app}{\textbf{LibDupFinder}}, which automated duplicate detection against the Primo VE library catalog.

bullets.text: Designed and built a full-stack duplicate detection tool using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with a multi-tier AI-powered column detection system supporting multilingual spreadsheets with flexible schema.
bullets.latex: Designed and built a full-stack duplicate detection tool using \textbf{Next.js}, \textbf{React}, \textbf{TypeScript}, and \textbf{Tailwind CSS} with a multi-tier AI-powered column detection system supporting multilingual spreadsheets with flexible schema.

bullets.text: Architected a client-orchestrated design with serverless API routes proxying Primo VE, client-side spreadsheet parsing with intelligent data cleaning, and one-click XLSX export.
Led the project of UniPaint: Unified Space-time Video Inpainting via Mixture-of-Experts, ICCVW 2025.
bullets.latex: Led the project of \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.06340}{\textbf{UniPaint: Unified Space-time Video Inpainting via Mixture-of-Experts}}, ICCVW 2025.

bullets.text: Developed a diffusion model capable of performing video in-painting, out-painting, and interpolation under a single framework by generating masked areas based on given images and prior knowledge.
Designed a Mixture of Experts (MoE) attention mechanism to enhance flexibility across video generation tasks.
Achieved distinguished peer-review results across all tasks---equaling dedicated models, demonstrating the effectiveness of the unified model in producing high-quality output.

Developed semantic watermarking for LLM outputs to enable traceability and copyright attribution; improved robustness to paraphrasing/translation via semantic embeddings + LSH and Gumbel-Max sampling.

Proposed a cloud--device collaboration framework for multimodal on-device model adaptation without on-device fine-tuning; implemented a cloud domain adapter and co-authored ://arxiv.org/abs/2406.01601an ACM TOMM paper.

Built a rapid competitive landscape dataset with Python for China's aluminum sector by extracting and synthesizing two years of disclosures from 15 major listed companies; delivered a structured comparison of business positioning, competitive advantages, and profitability drivers.

Authored a 26-page A-share equity deep-dive on East Money, reviewing 1,500+ pages of filings to map business segments; performed financial statement analysis and produced a 3-year earnings and valuation outlook.

projects.title: Library DupFinder -- Northwestern University Library
projects.description: Automates duplicate detection against the Primo VE library catalog.

bullets.text: Designed and built a full-stack duplicate detection tool using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with a multi-tier AI-powered column detection system supporting multilingual spreadsheets with flexible schema.
Architected a client-orchestrated design with serverless API routes proxying Primo VE, client-sides spreadsheet parsing with intelligent data cleaning and one-click XLSX export.
Engineered a tiered search pipeline with confidence-based classification combining ISBN exact matching, title+author fuzzy matching, and loose form fallbacks.

projects.title: TaskPulse: Zero-barrier Agile Coordination for Student Projects

bullets.text: Led the design and architecture of a zero-friction agile platform that eliminates account setup barriers, allowing teams to achieve instant real-time synchronization via Firebase and shared project tokens.

Developed a signature urgency-detection engine that proactively flags and sorts "At Risk" tasks based on deadline proximity and activity status, shifting the team focus from simple tracking to proactive risk mitigation.

Engineered a high-performance frontend using React and Tailwind CSS v4, integrating automated "nudge" reminders and a collaborative pinning system to maintain a high-velocity "pulse" on critical project path items.

projects.title: MedusaGaze: Motion & Eye-Directed Multitask System for Real-time Interaction

bullets.text: Architected a real-time multitask system in PyTorch that integrates gaze estimation and Action Unit detection into a unified pipeline, enabling high-frequency, low-latency facial behavior analysis.
Developed a gesture-driven interaction engine that translates eye-tracking vectors and facial expressions into system-level commands, facilitating precise hands-free navigation and accessibility.
Engineered an automated calibration suite utilizing affine transformations to provide instant user personalization, ensuring robust tracking performance across diverse environments and hardware.

projects.title: 3D Reconstruction and Uncertainty Estimation of CMRI with Active Acquisition

bullets.text: Led end-to-end development of ActiveCMR, a deployability-oriented machine learning system that couples a conditional generative model with Bayesian uncertainty to reconstruct 3D cardiac volumes from sparse 2D segmentations.
bullets.latex: Led end-to-end development of \textit{ActiveCMR}, a deployability-oriented machine learning system that couples a conditional generative model with Bayesian uncertainty to reconstruct 3D cardiac volumes from sparse 2D segmentations.

bullets.text: Designed an multi-condition aggregator to fuse heterogeneous slice conditions, improving robustness in clinical workflows.

Collaborated with clinicians at Fudan University–affiliated hospitals to validate under real protocol settings; achieved state-of-the-art accuracy on the UK Digital Heart dataset and more than 100 retrospective clinical cases.
Cut required acquisitions by 60 without degrading accuracy, enabling shorter exam times and higher throughput.

projects.title: UniPaint: Unified Space-time Video Inpainting via Mixture-of-Experts

bullets.text: Developed a diffusion model capable of performing video in-painting, out-painting, and interpolation under a single framework by generating masked areas based on given images and prior knowledge.
Designed a Mixture of Experts (MoE) attention mechanism to enhance flexibility across video generation tasks.
Achieved distinguished peer-review results across all tasks—equaling dedicated models, demonstrating the effectiveness of the unified model in producing high-quality output.

projects.title: Invisible Watermarks for Graph Generation Diffusion Model

bullets.text: Watermarked discrete graphs, like molecules, to enhance traceability and ownership validation of generated contents.
Tackled challenges in embedding watermarks into graphs with discrete node features by mapping to continuous latent space with an AutoEncoder.
Embedded the watermark within the initial noise of the diffusion process and implemented watermark detection through DDIM inversion, enabling watermarking using a key string.

projects.title: Generative Semantic Watermark for Large Language Models
projects.description: Research Assistant, National University of Singapore

bullets.text: Aimed to embed imperceptible and traceable watermarks into the output of large language models (LLMs) to support copyright claims and ensure traceability of AI-generated content.
Utilized CLIP and locality-sensitive hashing to design a semantic-level context-sensitive watermarking method that is robust against paraphrasing and translation attacks.
Replaced naïve sampling with GumbleMax sampling seeded with semantic information to implant watermarks without altering the statistical features of generated text.

projects.title: Multi-modal On-device Model Adaptation via Cloud-device Collaboration
projects.description: Research Assistant, National University of Singapore

bullets.text: Proposed a cloud-device collaboration framework that allows on-device models to adapt to their specific tasks and use cases without the need of further on-device fine-tuning.
Utilized HyperNetwork deployed on the cloud as a fast domain adapter to generate parameters for on-device models based on device data.
Co-authored a paper in ACM TOMM, titled “Backpropagation-Free Multi-modal On-Device Model Adaptation via Cloud-Device Collaboration”
